F THERMAL INSULATION Remarks
#REF! SupplyandinstallationofExternalThermalinsulation(NitrileRubber)with7mil
thick factory laminated fibreglass cloth protective coating on ducts as per the Comply
specifications.
#REF! 13 mm thick insulation for supply air ducts in return air path. sq.m 6163
#REF! 19 mm thick insulation for return air ducts. sq.m 576

#REF! 25 mm thick insulation for supply & return air ducts exposed to weather. sq.m RO

thickness minimum 7 mm
Supply,installation,testingandcommissioningof 25mmthickclosedcellnitrile sq.m 3443 Comply
rubberthermalinsulationforexposedductingalongwithfactorylaminatedglass
cloth of 7 mil thickness with UV protection.
76 Supply, installation testing and commissioning of acoustic insulation. Material Complies for

density 180 - 220
specification.
Kg/m3

screws Kg/m3

78 Supply, installation of acoustic enclosure for Axial flow fans. The outer panel
shallbemadeofgalvanizedpreplasticisedsheetof24gagethickandinternally
linedwith50mmthickfibreglasshaving64Kg/cumdensityandcoveredwith
tissue and 28 gauge perforated aluminium inside as shown in drawings. The Nos. RO
panels shall be duly bolted, joints provided with gaskets and suitably braced.
